song_phenotyping

Getting started

  • Installation
    • Requirements
    • Install from source
    • Optional extras
    • Configuration
  • Usage guide
    • Quick start
    • Stage A — Spectrogram ingestion
      • Stage A1 — Fixed-length slicing (optional)
    • Stage B — Flattening
    • Stage C — UMAP embedding
    • Stage D — Clustering and labelling
      • Custom HDBSCAN grid
    • Stage E — Phenotyping
    • Visual inspection — HTML catalogs
    • Configuration
